ARCHITECTURE

How The Encryption Works

Your system diagram — click to zoom in for full details.

alt="System Architecture Diagram">
🔍 Click to zoom
Layer 1
AES-256-GCM Encryption
Raw source code wrapped with KEY 1 — stored server-side only
Layer 2
AES-256-GCM Encryption
Layer 1 output wrapped again with KEY 2 — completely separate key
Layer 3 — My Custom ENC
Custom Encoding Camouflage
Final layer scrambles AES output using a secret encoding table — attacker sees this first and has no idea what it is
FEATURES

Everything You Need

Built for software companies and developers who need to protect and deliver their apps professionally.

🔐
Triple-Layer Encryption
Double AES-256-GCM plus custom encoding. All three keys live server-side only. Mathematically uncrackable.
📱
Device Lock
Hardware fingerprinting binds the launcher to specific approved machines. Copied EXE files simply don't work elsewhere.
⚡
Instant Updates
Change your code from the backend. All running apps silently receive the update within 60 seconds. No new EXE needed.
🗂️
Full Project Support
Upload entire project folders — HTML, CSS, JS, images, assets. Multi-file projects work perfectly.
🐍
HTML + Python Support
Protect and deliver both HTML web apps and Python desktop applications using the same encryption system.
✏️
Client Editor Portal
Give clients a secure link to edit only their own code. Changes save directly to backend. You stay in control.
🔔
Backend Popup System
Force popups, one-time notices, or repeat interval popups — all controlled from backend without updating the EXE.
🛡️
Brute Force Protection
IP-based lockout after 5 failed attempts. KV-backed persistence survives worker restarts.
SECURITY

Why It's Unbreakable

Every layer is designed to stop attackers cold — even with physical access to the machine.

🔑
Keys Never Leave Server
All three encryption keys live in Cloudflare environment variables. Never exposed in responses or logs.
⏱️
Replay Attack Blocked
HMAC-signed nonce + timestamp tokens. One-time use only. 60-second expiry window.
💻
Hardware Fingerprinting
BIOS serial, UUID, MAC, CPU, RAM — SHA256 hashed. Impossible to spoof without exact values.
🚫
Raw Code Never Exposed
Decryption happens server-side. Client receives rendered output only. Source stays protected.
